channel.title: Window-Manager on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Window-Manager on Arrans github.io

item.title: klange/toaruos
item.description: A completely-from-scratch hobby operating system: bootloader, kernel, drivers, C library, and userspace including a composited graphical UI, dynamic linker, syntax-highlighting text editor, network stack, etc.

item.title: libnativeapi/nativeapi-flutter
item.description: Flutter bindings for nativeapi - providing seamless, unified access to native system APIs.

item.title: coastalwhite/lemurs
item.description: A customizable TUI display/login manager written in Rust 🐒

item.title: leanflutter/window_manager
item.description: The window_manager plugin provides comprehensive window management capabilities for Flutter desktop applications, enabling full control over window size, position, appearance, close behavior, and listening to events.
